title: 📚 SCBE-AETHERMOORE Reference Manuals - Quick Lookup
content:
# 📚 SCBE-AETHERMOORE Reference Manuals - Quick Lookup

SCBE-AETHERMOORE Reference Manuals
Quick-Access Technical Documentation
Consolidated reference materials for implementation, debugging, and architecture review
🗣️ Sacred Tongue Tokenizer
Core Mechanism
Formula: Token = Prefix[High_Nibble] + "'" + Suffix[Low_Nibble]
Encoding Process:
Take input byte (0-255)
Split into high nibble (bits 7-4) and low nibble (bits 3-0)
Map high nibble → prefix from tongue vocabulary
Map low nibble → suffix from tongue vocabulary
Concatenate: tongue:prefix'suffix
Example: 0x2A → Binary 0010 1010 → High 0010 (2), Low 1010 (10) → ko:vel'an
Properties:
Bijective: Every byte ↔ exactly one token
Deterministic: Same byte always produces same token
Constant-time: O(1) encoding/decoding
Expansion ratio: ~8x (trade-off for readability)
The Six Sacred Tongues
Sample Tokens by Tongue:
KO: sil'a, vel'an, kor'el
AV: saina'a, maren'en, vali'al
RU: khar'ak, bront'rune, tor'ul
CA: bip'a, klik'lo, zap'ix
UM: veil'a, shade'nul, mist'om
DR: anvil'a, rivet'ul, forge'on
🔐 RWP v2/v3 Envelope Format
Standard Structure
SS1|kid=k02|salt=ru:khar'ak ru:bront'ul|ct=ca:bip'a ca:klik'lo|tag=dr:anvil'a
Field Specifications
Visual Parsing
Valid envelope:
ru:khar'ak ru:tor'ul      ← Heavy words = Salt ✓
ca:bip'a ca:zap'ix        ← Mechanical = Ciphertext ✓
dr:anvil'a dr:forge'on    ← Industrial = Auth tag ✓
Tampered envelope:
ru:khar'ak ca:bip'a       ← Mixed styles = Tampered ✗
🎵 Harmonic Constants
Golden Ratio (φ)
Value: 1.618033988749894...
Powers:
φ¹ = 1.618
φ² = 2.618
φ³ = 4.236
φ⁴ = 6.854
φ⁵ = 11.090
Applications:
Tongue weight scaling
Phase angle spacing (60° increments)
Cost amplification exponents
Frequency Map
Base frequency: 440 Hz (A4)
🔢 Mathematical Primitives
Hyperbolic Distance (Poincaré Ball)
Formula:
$$d_H(p, q) = text{arcosh}left(1 + 2frac{|p - q|^2}{(1 - |p|^2)(1 - |q|^2)}right)$$
Properties:
Domain: Unit ball (‖p‖ < 1, ‖q‖ < 1)
Range: [0, ∞)
Small Euclidean distances → Large hyperbolic distances near boundary
Cost Amplification
Defender cost: O(1) — constant overhead
Attacker cost:
$$C_{attack} = R^{d^2} cdot text{BaseOps}$$
Where:
R = Base resource multiplier (~10³)
d = Normalized hyperbolic distance (0-1)
BaseOps = Baseline operations (~10⁶)
At d* = 0.99:
Attacker cost: ~10¹⁵ operations
Defender cost: ~10⁸ operations
Asymmetry ratio: 117,000× advantage
🛡️ Security Layers (14-Layer Stack)
Layer Overview
Symphonic Cipher — Frequency-domain encryption
Hyperbolic Embedding — Geometric trust manifold
Golden-Ratio Scaling — φ-based key derivation
SCBE Core — Spectral coherence checks
GeoSeal — Access control kernel
PHDM — Polyhedral mesh routing
Langues Weighting — Multi-tongue cost metrics
Harmonic Wall — Anomaly detection
Temporal Attestation — Replay protection
Swarm Consensus — Byzantine fault tolerance (2f+1)
PQC Integration — ML-KEM-768, ML-DSA-65
QKD Compatibility — BB84/E91 key exchange
Sacred Eggs — Ritual-based secret distribution
Vector RAG — Context-aware semantic search
🔧 Implementation Quick Reference
Python API
Encoding:
from sacred_tongues import SacredTongueTokenizer

tokenizer = SacredTongueTokenizer()
encoded = tokenizer.encode(b"Hello", tongue='CA')
# Output: "ca:bip'H ca:klik'e ca:zap'l ca:zap'l ca:zap'o"
Decoding:
decoded = tokenizer.decode(encoded, tongue='CA')
assert decoded == b"Hello"
Cross-Tokenization:
translated, attestation = tokenizer.xlate(
    "ko:sil'a ko:vel'an",
    from_tongue='KO',
    to_tongue='DR'
)
# translated: "dr:anvil'a dr:rivet'an"
# attestation: {"phase_delta": 300, "weight_ratio": 11.09}
CLI Commands
Encode:
python aethermoore_suite.py encode --tongue KO --input "Secret"
Decode:
python aethermoore_suite.py decode --tongue KO --input "ko:sil'S..."
Validate envelope:
python aethermoore_suite.py validate --envelope "SS1|kid=k02|..."
📊 Performance Benchmarks
Encoding Speed
Single byte: <1 μs
1 KB payload: ~500 μs
1 MB payload: ~450 ms
API Latency
Encode + Encrypt: <15 ms (p95)
Decrypt + Decode: <12 ms (p95)
Cross-tokenize: <8 ms (p95)
Detection Accuracy
Adversarial requests: 95.3% detection rate
False positives: <2.1%
Baseline comparison: +56.6% improvement
